大发精准单带老师【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-238932578_63681215<br>vk.com/topic-238994624_63158791<br>vk.com/topic-239000271_64829094<br>vk.com/topic-238948365_63073143<br>vk.com/topic-239000240_64256943<br>vk.com/topic-239000241_64829059<br>vk.com/topic-238951753_63374533<br>vk.com/topic-239000233_63374523<br>vk.com/topic-239000263_63374549<br>vk.com/topic-239000301_64829091<br>vk.com/topic-238952830_64257090<br>vk.com/topic-238901464_63158792<br>vk.com/topic-238975858_63681092<br>vk.com/topic-238973706_63510075<br>vk.com/topic-238948466_63510079<br>vk.com/topic-238973344_63158981<br>vk.com/topic-238948532_63772132<br>vk.com/topic-239000244_63158857<br>vk.com/topic-239000234_63158839<br>vk.com/topic-238863780_64257157<br>vk.com/topic-238867831_64829216<br>vk.com/topic-239000265_63073219<br>vk.com/topic-239000305_63073237<br>vk.com/topic-238973344_63159023<br>vk.com/topic-238981894_63158886<br>vk.com/topic-239000251_64829171<br>vk.com/topic-239000270_64257185<br>vk.com/topic-239000239_63955240<br>vk.com/topic-239000256_63510132<br>vk.com/topic-238948379_63955260<br>vk.com/topic-239000252_63772152<br>vk.com/topic-239000303_63374644<br>vk.com/topic-238994472_63772190<br>vk.com/topi
